chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 77 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Progress reports filed by respondents No.4, 5 and 12, are taken on record, which reflect that the remaining accused Rano has now been arrested. The Petition is disposed of having served its purpose. Judge ARBROHI/PS
